attacking_style: Not an attacker; serves as a lead-out domestique willing to sacrifice personal opportunities in final 200m+ to deliver teammates.
team_tactics: Functions as tempo driver in finale, executing high-speed lead-out work that prioritizes team sprinters over personal result
terrain_preference: Sprint finales where he can contribute as lead-out rather than compete for placement; flat power stages
vulnerability: Personal sprint opportunities sacrificed for team duty; unclear if capable of finishing sprints when given freedom
key_patterns: Drives tempo for 200m+ before finale, sacrificing personal sprint opportunity (observed: Tour de Pologne)
Team-first mentality prioritizes delivering teammates over seeking own result in sprint stages
Israeli Academy deploys him as domestique in multi-rider sprint setups
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation shows tactical role clarity but insufficient data for form assessment
